name: Spiced Turmeric Poached Egg with Spinach
steps: Heat a dry pan over medium. Toast the pine nuts for 2 minutes, then set aside.
In the same pan, heat 1 tbsp olive oil. Stir-fry spinach and tomatoes for 2 minutes until wilted. Season with salt and pepper.
Boil a pot of water. Add vinegar and turmeric. Reduce heat to a simmer. Poach each egg for 3 minutes, then remove with a slotted spoon.
Divide the spinach mixture between two bowls. Top each with a poached egg and toasted pine nuts. Season and serve immediately.

name: Cottage Cheese & Basil Filled Omelet
steps: Beat the eggs and water in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Heat oil or butter in a pan over medium heat. Add enough egg mixture to make a thin omelet. Cook until set, keep warm under foil. Repeat to make four omelets.
Finely chop the basil and mix with cottage cheese. Add pepper to taste.
Quarter the cherry tomatoes.
Divide the cheese mixture and tomatoes among the omelets. Roll each tightly, cut diagonally and serve.

name: Easy Herby Sausages
steps: Mix the ground pork with salt, pepper, sage, and basil in a bowl. Shape into eight sausages.
Heat coconut oil in a large non-stick pan over medium heat. Cook the sausages until browned and cooked through.
Serve hot or refrigerate for later.

name: Egg & Avocado Filling
steps: Peel and chop the boiled eggs. Place in a bowl with minced garlic, diced avocado, and chopped coriander.
Drizzle with lemon juice and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper and mix gently.
Garnish with more coriander. Serve on bread or as is.

name: Protein Cottage Cheese Pancakes
steps: Combine cottage cheese, egg yolks, vanilla, and flour in a bowl. Mix until smooth.
Whisk egg whites and coconut sugar into a stiff foam in a separate bowl.
Fold the egg whites into the cottage cheese mixture to make batter.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Spoon 2 tbsp batter per pancake. Cook 3 minutes until browned, then flip and cook 2 more minutes.
Serve warm with Greek yogurt, honey, and berries.

name: Gluten-Free Tropical Granola
steps: Preheat the oven to 250F (120C) and line two baking sheets with parchment.
Blend pineapple, dates, orange juice, vanilla, and cinnamon until smooth. Add melted coconut oil and blend.
Mix chopped almonds, cashews, coconut flakes, sunflower seeds, and a pinch of salt in a bowl. Fold in the pineapple mixture.
Spread evenly on the baking sheets.
Bake about 2 hours, stirring every 20 minutes and rotating sheets after 1 hour. Remove when golden brown.
Cool before transferring to airtight containers. Keeps up to two weeks.

name: Egg & Smoked Mackerel Paste
steps: Peel and chop the hard-boiled eggs. Place in a bowl.
Debone and chop the mackerel. Add to the bowl with the eggs.
Add chopped onion and gherkins.
Season with salt and pepper. Add mayonnaise, yogurt, and chives. Mix well.
Serve with bread, vegetables, or alone.

name: Egg Broccoli & Ham Breakfast Muffins
steps: Preheat the oven to 360F (180C).
Boil the broccoli for 3 minutes, then drain and chop.
Beat the eggs in a bowl. Add minced garlic, a pinch of salt and pepper.
Grease a 6-mold muffin tray. Distribute the broccoli, ham, and cheese among the molds.
Pour the egg mixture into each mold. Bake 10-15 minutes until set.

name: High Protein Egg, Bacon & Avocado Breakfast Bowl
ingredients: 1 tbsp red bell pepper, finely chopped
steps: Fry the bacon in a non-stick pan until crisp. Cool slightly, then chop.
Combine the bacon, eggs, avocado, onion, and bell pepper in a bowl.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve.

name: Asian Inspired Scrambled Eggs
ingredients: 2 tbsp coriander, chopped (plus extra for garnish)
steps: Separate the egg yolks from the whites. Mix the yolks with tamari and chopped coriander.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Cook the egg whites until almost set.
Reduce heat to low. Fold in the yolk mixture and stir gently for 30 seconds until creamy.
Serve with black sesame seeds and extra coriander. Add avocado slices on the side.

name: Garlic Herb Baked Zucchini Fries
steps: Preheat the oven to 430F (220C).
Cut the zucchini into sticks like fries.
Whisk the egg with plant milk, garlic, oregano, thyme, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Grease a baking tray with 1 tbsp olive oil. Spread breadcrumbs on a plate.
Dip each zucchini stick in the egg mixture, coat with breadcrumbs, place on the tray.
Bake 15 minutes, turning often and drizzling with 2 tbsp olive oil during cooking.

name: Tofu Summer Rolls with Caesar Sauce
steps: Slice the tofu into two thin rectangles and press with a towel to remove moisture.
Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Cook tofu 4-5 minutes per side until golden. Cool and slice into 8 strips.
Dip a rice paper wrapper in warm water until softened, then place on a damp towel.
Add tofu strips, avocado, Parmesan, and lettuce to the center.
Fold the sides inward and roll tightly. Repeat with remaining wrappers.
Serve immediately with Caesar dressing.

name: The Best Sweetcorn Fritters
steps: In a large bowl, combine sweetcorn, coriander, and lemon zest. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in buckwheat flour and water until smooth.
Heat coconut oil in a non-stick skillet over high heat. Ladle in the mixture, cooking in batches of four fritters, using 1/2 tsp oil per fritter.
Cook each fritter 2-3 minutes per side until browned. One fritter is one serve.

name: Green Pea & Tofu Paste
steps: Defrost frozen peas in a bowl of boiling water.
Combine peas, crumbled tofu, avocado, mint leaves, olive oil, and lemon juice in a blender. Season with salt and pepper.
Blend until smooth. Adjust flavor with more mint or lemon juice if needed.
Serve with toast.

name: Creamy Black Bean Hummus
ingredients: 1x 14 oz (400g) can black beans, reserve the water
steps: Blend 1/4 cup black bean water with garlic, olive oil, tahini, lime juice, cumin, salt, and cayenne until smooth.
Add black beans and blend 1-2 minutes until creamy.
Serve with vegetables or crackers. Store sealed in the fridge up to one week.

name: Kale Tofu Salad with Peanut Dressing
steps: Wrap tofu in a towel and press to remove moisture.
Combine chopped kale, shredded cabbage, and grated carrot in a large bowl.
Whisk peanut butter, coconut milk, rice vinegar, honey, soy sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes until smooth (add 1-2 tbsp water to thin).
Heat coconut oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Slice tofu into strips, season, and fry 5 minutes per side until golden.
Divide salad into bowls, top with tofu, drizzle with dressing.

name: Smoked Salmon & Strawberry Salad Mix
ingredients: 2 oz (60g) lamb's lettuce, rocket, or a mix
steps: Whisk honey, olive oil, lemon juice, and honey mustard in a bowl.
Divide lettuce between two plates and top with the remaining ingredients.
Drizzle dressing over salads. Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

name: Chicken, Avocado & Cucumber Salad
steps: Toss shredded lettuce and torn basil in a large bowl. Divide among 4 serving bowls.
Season chicken with salt and rub with olive oil. Fry in a dry pan over medium heat 5 minutes per side.
Mix mustard and honey. Brush filets with half the sauce, flip, cook 1.5 minutes. Repeat on the other side. Cool and chop.
Cube avocado and drizzle with lemon juice. Slice cucumber.
Mix yogurt, mayonnaise, and minced garlic for the garlic sauce. Season.
Top salads with chicken, avocado, cucumber, and walnuts. Drizzle with garlic sauce.

name: Cured Ham, Pear & Walnut Salad
ingredients: 1 ripe pear, peeled, quartered, cored & sliced
3.5 oz (100g) cured ham, cut into strips
steps: Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, and maple syrup in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide the rocket between two bowls.
Top with pear, blue cheese, ham, and walnuts.
Drizzle dressing over the salads and serve immediately.

name: Greek Cucumber Salad
steps: Whisk oregano, lemon juice, olive oil, and garlic in a bowl. Set aside.
Spiralize the cucumber. Cut into 2-3 inch noodles and place in a bowl.
Add cherry tomatoes, spring onions, feta, and olives to the cucumber.
Drizzle dressing over the salad and toss gently.
Divide between two plates and serve immediately.

name: Crushed Cucumber & Salmon Salad
steps: Combine chopped red bell pepper, crushed cucumber, sliced garlic, and chopped coriander in a large bowl.
Whisk lime juice, fish sauce, rice wine vinegar, sesame oil, and black sesame seeds.
Drizzle dressing over the vegetables and toss to coat.
Divide between two plates. Flake salmon and arrange on top.
Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

name: High Protein Coronation Chicken Salad
ingredients: 5 oz (150g) chicken, pre-cooked and cold, chopped
steps: In a bowl, combine and mix mayonnaise, Greek yogurt, and curry powder.
Add chicken, apricots, and celery. Season with salt and pepper, then mix well to coat.
Serve with a side salad or use as a sandwich filling.

name: Grilled Veg Salad with Tuna, Mint & Pistachio
ingredients: 5.6 oz (160g) canned tuna in olive oil
steps: Drain the tuna oil into a bowl.
For the dressing, blitz lemon zest, lemon juice, tuna oil, mint leaves, and garlic in a blender until smooth. Season.
Slice zucchinis, season. Grill on a pan over medium heat 6 minutes, turning once. Grill asparagus 4 minutes.
Toss grilled vegetables with the dressing.
Divide vegetables and tuna among four plates. Sprinkle with pistachios and serve.

name: High Protein Turkey Salad
steps: Blend tahini, water, lemon juice, garlic, and honey in a food processor until creamy. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, combine all the salad ingredients and mix well.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
Serve immediately or refrigerate.

name: Easy Salmon Spring Rolls
steps: Boil a small amount of water, then remove from heat. Dip each rice paper sheet for 30 seconds, then lay flat on a damp cloth.
Place coriander leaves, salmon, and black pepper on each sheet. Wrap into rolls.
Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat. Fry rolls 2 minutes per side until golden.
Drain on a paper towel. Serve with tamari and a side salad.

name: Cod with Creamy Sauce with Zoodles
steps: Cut the cod into pieces. Season with salt, pepper, paprika, turmeric, oregano, and chili. Coat with buckwheat flour.
Heat 2 tbsp oil in a pan over medium heat. Fry the cod 5 minutes per side until golden.
Combine cream and hot vegetable stock. Pour over the cod. Bring to a boil, then simmer 2-3 minutes. Add chives and simmer 1-2 minutes.
Make zucchini noodles with a julienne peeler or spiralizer.
Heat 1 tsp oil in another pan. Saute garlic 30 seconds. Add zoodles, cook 3-4 minutes. Season and stir in sun dried tomatoes.
Divide zoodles between two bowls. Top with cod and spoon over the sauce.

name: Jerk Chicken with Coconut Cauliflower Rice
steps: Combine thyme, allspice, brown sugar, garlic powder, cinnamon, cayenne, olive oil, lime juice, salt and pepper for the marinade. Coat the chicken and marinate at least 15 minutes.
Heat 1 tbsp coconut oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Saute diced onion 3 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cauliflower rice. Cook 2 minutes, then pour in coconut milk. Cook 10 minutes until absorbed. Stir in lime zest and juice. Season.
Heat remaining 1 tbsp coconut oil in another pan. Cook the chicken 8-10 minutes, turning, until cooked through.
Serve chicken on cauliflower rice. Garnish with coriander and lime wedges.

name: Zesty Chicken & Asparagus Salad
steps: Preheat the oven to 400F (200C). Grate 2 tbsp lemon zest, then halve the lemons.
Mix lemon zest, oregano, olive oil, and garlic. Add chicken, season, and toss to coat.
Place chicken and lemon halves on a baking tray. Bake 20-25 minutes until cooked. Cool and chop.
Heat coconut oil in a skillet. Cook asparagus and green onions 3-4 minutes until tender. Cut into 2-inch pieces.
Arrange rocket on plates, top with asparagus and green onions. Drizzle with white wine vinegar, season, and serve with chicken and roasted lemon.

name: Baked Quinoa Chicken Nuggets
ingredients: 1 lb (450g) chicken breasts, cut into chunks
steps: Preheat the oven to 350F (180C). Spread cooked quinoa on a parchment-lined tray. Bake 20-25 minutes, stirring, until crispy. Cool.
Increase oven temperature to 390F (200C).
Mix beaten egg, Parmesan, and dried herbs in a bowl.
Dip chicken chunks in the egg mixture, then coat with quinoa.
Arrange on a parchment-lined tray. Bake 15-20 minutes until cooked through.

name: Sesame Ginger Beef Stir Fry with Zoodles
steps: Combine tamari, rice wine vinegar, and sweetener. Set aside.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Cook beef 7-10 minutes until done. Push to one side. Add sesame oil, ginger, and garlic to the empty space, cook 1 minute.
Pour in the sauce and stir to coat the beef. Cook 1 minute.
Briefly heat spiralized zucchinis with the beef to serve.

name: Shrimp Tom Yum Soup
steps: Pour vegetable stock into a pot and add Tom Yum paste. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
Stir in coconut milk, tomatoes, and mushrooms. Cook 5 minutes until tender.
Add shrimp and cook 1 minute until pink.
Remove from heat and season with fish sauce and lime juice.
Garnish with fresh coriander and chili to serve.

name: Baked Salmon & Warm Quinoa Salad
steps: Preheat the oven to 400F (200C).
Cut the red bell pepper into strips. Heat olive oil over medium heat and stir-fry the peppers 5 minutes.
Place salmon on a lined baking tray. Season and bake 10 minutes.
Blanch sugar snap peas in boiling water. Add peas and quinoa to the peppers. Heat 4 minutes, stirring.
Chop parsley and chives, mix into the quinoa.
Serve the quinoa salad with the baked salmon.

name: Protein Strawberry Muffins
steps: Preheat the oven to 350F (180C).
Combine all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
Mix all wet ingredients in a separate bowl until smooth.
Gradually stir the wet mixture into the dry until combined. Fold in strawberries and most of the chocolate.
Line a muffin tray with liners and spray with oil. Distribute the batter evenly and top with reserved chocolate.
Bake 23-25 minutes until set and lightly browned. Cool in the tray 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack.

name: Yogurt & Peanut Butter Protein Fluff
ingredients: 2 tbsp peanut butter or almond butter
steps: Whisk all ingredients in a bowl until fluffy.
Serve across two bowls and top with your choice of garnish (banana slices, granola, blueberries).

name: Easy Banana & Strawberry Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 350F (180C).
Blitz the bananas in a food processor until smooth.
Add egg, coconut oil, and xylitol; blend. Add wheat flour, buckwheat flour, and baking powder; blend into a smooth batter.
Pour the batter into a greased cake tray and top with halved strawberries.
Bake 60 minutes until golden brown and a tester comes out clean.

name: Ferrero Rocher Energy Balls
ingredients: 6.3 oz (180g) hazelnuts, plus 12 whole hazelnuts for filling
steps: Pulse 1 cup hazelnuts in a food processor until finely chopped. Add cocoa powder, maple syrup, vanilla, sea salt, and chocolate chunks. Pulse until the mixture clumps (add 1-2 tsp water if too dry).
Roll into bite-sized balls, inserting a whole hazelnut into each.
Serve immediately or refrigerate.

name: Almond & Coconut Energy Balls
ingredients: 2 tbsp desiccated coconut or poppy seeds
steps: Combine almond meal, honey, and melted coconut oil in a bowl. Mix thoroughly with your hands.
Add lemon juice, then form the mixture into 6 balls.
Roll each ball in desiccated coconut or poppy seeds.

name: Mocha Energy Balls
steps: Melt the chocolate in a bowl in the microwave.
Heat coconut milk, instant coffee, and sugar in a saucepan until nearly boiling.
Whisk in almond butter and a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Pour the hot mixture over the melted chocolate and stir until combined.
Cover with cling film and refrigerate 2 hours until firm.
Dust a surface with cocoa powder. Scoop and shape into 10 balls, rolling in cocoa. Serve at room temperature.

name: Plant-Based Creme Brulee
ingredients: 6.7 fl oz (200ml) full-fat canned coconut milk
steps: Split the vanilla pod and scrape out the seeds. Set both aside.
Combine coconut milk, almond milk, half the brown sugar, agar-agar, and the vanilla pod and seeds in a pot. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
Discard the vanilla pod. Pour into 4 dishes and refrigerate 1 hour to set.
Sprinkle the remaining brown sugar over each dish. Caramelize with a kitchen torch until golden and bubbly.

name: Stuffed Banana Chocolate Bites
steps: Line a tray with baking paper.
Peel and slice the bananas.
Place 1/2 tsp peanut butter on a banana slice and top with another slice, making about 30 sandwiches.
Arrange on the tray and freeze 1 hour.
Melt the chocolate chips and coconut oil.
Dip each frozen sandwich into the chocolate, coating half. Return to the tray and freeze until set.

name: Mushroom & Brie Omelet
steps: Heat a large non-stick pan over high heat with a splash of olive oil. Add mushrooms and garlic, cook 5-7 minutes. Transfer to a bowl.
Heat a little olive oil over medium-high heat in a small non-stick pan.
Whisk eggs with 1/4 cup cold water. Season.
Pour a quarter of the egg mixture into the pan. Cook until starting to set, then add mushrooms and brie. Cook until the cheese melts.
Transfer to a plate, top with rocket. Repeat for three more omelets.

name: Pea, Potato & Goat Cheese Frittata
steps: Heat a 7.8-inch (20cm) ovenproof non-stick pan over medium heat and grease with olive oil. Cook potato slices 5-6 minutes per side until golden. Set aside.
Defrost and drain the peas in hot water.
Whisk the eggs with salt and pepper.
Preheat the grill to medium. In the pan, layer half the potatoes, then half the peas and goat cheese. Repeat and pour the eggs over.
Cook on low-medium 10 minutes until nearly set. Grill 5 minutes until fully set.
Cut into wedges and serve with rocket.

name: The Classic Healthy Shakshuka
steps: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Cook onion and bell peppers 5 minutes until softened.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook 5 more minutes.
Make 4 wells in the mixture and crack an egg into each.
Reduce heat to low, cover partially, and cook 10 minutes until eggs are done.
Sprinkle with parsley, season, and serve.

name: Cottage Cheese & Salmon Platter
steps: Peel the cucumber into ribbons and mix with 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar and salt in a bowl. Set aside.
Divide smoked salmon, avocado, and cottage cheese among four plates.
Top with cucumber ribbons and drizzle with cucumber juices.
Season with dried dill, salt, and pepper. Serve immediately.

name: Cottage Cheese & Cinnamon Pancakes
steps: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Heat 1/2 tbsp coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake into the pan. Cook until bubbles form, then flip and cook until golden brown.
Repeat with remaining batter. Serve with banana slices, nuts, or honey.

name: Purple Power Protein Smoothie
steps: Blend all ingredients in a blender until smooth. Serve.

name: Cinnamon Spiced Granola
steps: Preheat the oven to 325F (160C) and line a baking tray with parchment.
Mix oats, walnuts, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt in a large bowl. Stir in almond butter and maple syrup until combined.
Spread the mixture on the tray and bake 15 minutes. Stir, then bake another 10-12 minutes until golden.
Cool on a wire rack and store airtight up to one week.

name: Strawberry & Cottage Cheese Smoothie Bowl
steps: Blend cottage cheese, strawberries, and maple syrup in a blender until smooth.
Divide into 4 bowls. Top with granola and berries. Serve.

name: High Protein Vanilla Porridge
steps: Boil almond milk in a small pot. Stir in oats and cook on low 5-7 minutes, stirring often.
Remove from heat and mix in protein powder.
Divide into bowls and top with banana slices and walnuts. Serve.

name: Chickpea & Tomato Bruschetta
steps: Toast the bread.
Mash chickpeas with tahini, 1 tsp apple cider vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Mix cherry tomatoes, parsley, and 1 tbsp olive oil.
Spread chickpeas on toast, top with tomatoes, and serve.

name: Roasted Pepper Pesto Pasta Salad
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions. Drain and rinse with cold water.
Mix the pasta with roasted peppers, pesto, mozzarella, and rocket. Toss well.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 3 days.

name: The Best Chickpea & Quinoa Tabbouleh
steps: Cook quinoa per package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Mix quinoa, chickpeas, tomatoes, cucumber, parsley, 3 tbsp olive oil, and 2 tbsp red wine vinegar. Season.
Chill in the fridge and serve cold.

name: Baked Lentil & Parsley Falafels
steps: Preheat the oven to 350F (180C).
Pulse lentils, parsley, garlic, lemon juice, 1.5 tbsp olive oil, and 1 tsp salt in a food processor until crumbly and sticking together. Stir in flour.
Form patties with a large tablespoon of the mixture and place on a baking sheet.
Bake 18-20 minutes.
Serve warm or cold in salads, sandwiches, or with dips.

name: Beef, Zucchini & Quinoa Burgers
steps: Grate and squeeze the zucchini to remove moisture.
Mix the zucchini with beef, quinoa, garlic, egg, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Form into 8 patties.
Cook in a hot, oiled grill pan 5-6 minutes per side.
Store in an airtight container in the fridge 3-4 days.

name: Easy Spicy Tuna
ingredients: 2 green onions, sliced (white & green parts separated)
steps: Cut the tuna into small cubes. Mix with sriracha, sesame oil, and white parts of the green onions. Transfer to a bowl.
Garnish with green onion tops and sesame seeds. Serve with steamed white rice.

name: Spiced Cajun Salmon with Corn Salsa Salad
steps: Preheat the oven to 425F (220C).
Rub Cajun seasoning mixed with 2 tbsp olive oil onto the salmon filets.
Bake the salmon on a tray 12-15 minutes until done.
Cut corn kernels off the cobs into a bowl. Add cherry tomatoes and coriander, toss.
Serve the corn salsa with salmon filets on 4 plates.

name: Oven Baked Carrot Fritters
steps: Preheat the oven to 400F (200C) and line a tray with parchment.
Mix grated carrots, egg, flour, garlic, cumin, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Spoon a heaping tablespoon of batter onto the tray and flatten slightly.
Bake 12 minutes, flip, and bake another 12 minutes until golden.
Serve hot or cold.

name: Spiced Curry Cauliflower Soup
steps: Preheat the oven to 400F (200C). Drizzle 1/4 of the cauliflower with 1 tbsp olive oil and 1 tsp fennel seeds, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pot. Saute onion and 1 tsp fennel seeds 3-4 minutes. Add the remaining cauliflower, lentils, curry paste, and 1 liter water. Boil, then simmer 25 minutes.
Roast the reserved cauliflower in the oven 20 minutes.
Blend the soup until smooth. Serve topped with the roasted cauliflower.

name: Quinoa, Beetroot & Feta Salad
steps: Mix quinoa, feta, beetroot, and chickpeas in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice, add grated lemon zest. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide into 4 plates and serve.

name: Mexican Veggie Chili Salad
ingredients: 14 oz (400g) can black beans, rinsed & drained
7 oz (200g) can sweet corn, rinsed & drained
steps: Mix everything with the salsa in a bowl.
Store in an airtight container in the fridge up to 3 days.

name: Easy Slow Cooker Chicken Fajita
steps: Add all ingredients and a pinch of salt to a slow cooker. Stir.
Cook on high 4 hours or low 6 hours until tender.
Shred the chicken and return it to the slow cooker. Mix in lime juice and season.

name: One Pot Lemon Chicken with Capers
steps: Place a chicken breast between cling film and pound to 1.5cm thick. Season.
Heat 1/4 of the butter in a pan over medium-high heat. Cook the chicken 4 minutes per side until golden. Transfer to a plate.
Add the remaining butter to the pan. Stir until melted and golden. Add capers and cook 1 minute. Stir in lemon juice and half the zest.
Return chicken and juices to the pan. Cook 2-3 minutes until done and the sauce thickens.
Sprinkle with parsley and remaining zest before serving.

name: Prosciutto Wrapped Chicken with Warm Lentils
ingredients: 5 oz (145g) sun-dried tomatoes, drained (save 2 tbsp oil)
steps: Preheat the oven to 360F (180C).
Cut chicken thighs into two pieces. Season. Spread 1 tsp pesto on each piece, wrap with prosciutto, place on a baking tray. Bake 25-30 minutes until crispy and cooked through.
Heat lentils and sun-dried tomatoes in a pot. Stir in 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar and 2 tbsp sun-dried tomato oil.
Serve the lentils topped with chicken.

name: Creamy Spinach Risotto
steps: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add diced onion and cook 5 minutes until softened.
Add the risotto rice and cook 3 more minutes, stirring. Season.
Lower the heat and add vegetable stock 1 cup at a time, stirring often. Wait until mostly absorbed before adding more. Cook 16-18 minutes until the rice is done.
Stir in the frozen spinach and cook until heated through.
Remove from heat and mix in the Parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.

name: Salmon En Papillote
steps: Preheat the oven to 350F (180C). Cut two large pieces of baking paper.
Layer 8 zucchini slices and some onion on each. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil and season.
Place a salmon fillet on each. Season, then top with dill and lemon slices.
Fold the paper to seal each parcel. Bake 18-20 minutes until the salmon is cooked.
Serve immediately by tearing open the paper.

name: Chickpea & Broccoli Coconut Curry
steps: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Saute the broccoli 3-4 minutes. Add the red curry paste and cook 2 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and simmer 5-8 minutes. Stir in the chickpeas and simmer.
Mix the cornstarch with 2 tbsp cold water, then add to the pan. Simmer 1 minute, reduce heat, and cool slightly.
Serve with steamed white rice and fresh coriander.

name: Easy Stuffed Mexican Peppers
steps: Preheat the oven to 375F (190C).
Brown beef in a pan over medium-high heat 5-7 minutes.
Add tomatoes and rice, bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, 6-8 minutes.
Cut off the tops of the peppers and remove seeds. Stuff with the beef mixture.
Cover with foil and bake 35 minutes until the peppers are tender.

name: Sesame Crusted Miso Tuna Steak Salad
ingredients: Bunch of spring onions, trimmed & sliced
steps: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Rub tuna steaks with miso paste and coat with sesame seeds. Cook 1.5 minutes per side, then set aside.
In the same pan, cook spring onions and green beans 3-4 minutes until tender. Season and divide between two plates.
Slice tuna and place on top of the vegetables. Serve immediately.

name: Cod & Vegetable Curry
ingredients: 1.3 lbs (600g) white fish fillets (cod), coarsely chopped
steps: Heat olive oil in a wok or frying pan over high heat. Add chopped onion and cook 3-4 minutes.
Stir in curry paste and cook 1 minute.
Add coconut milk, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low.
Add fish and frozen vegetables. Simmer 15 minutes until cooked.
Serve with white rice and lime wedges.

name: Easy Pork Meatballs in Tomato Sauce
steps: Place pork in a bowl, season, add garlic, and mix. Shape into 1-tbsp meatballs.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Cook meatballs, turning, 10 minutes until browned and cooked through. Set aside.
In the same pan, add 1 tbsp oil and cook the onion 3-4 minutes. Return the meatballs, add the passata and season. Boil, then simmer 10 minutes.
Serve meatballs with parsley.

name: Smoked Sweet Potato Hummus
steps: Blend all the ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Serve as a dip.

name: Oatmeal Tahini Protein Balls
steps: Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
Shape into balls.
Store in the fridge up to 2 weeks or freeze up to 3 months.

name: Almond & Cranberry Balls
steps: Blend dates in a food processor until smooth. Add oats, cranberries, almonds, and almond butter, pulse until mixed.
Roll the mixture into balls using slightly wet hands. Chill in the fridge 1 hour to set.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator up to 2 weeks.

name: Peanut & Cranberry Cookies
steps: Preheat the oven to 360F (180C) and line two trays with parchment.
Mix peanut butter and coconut sugar in a bowl. Add the egg and baking powder, beat until smooth. Stir in the dried cranberries.
Roll dough into balls, place on trays and flatten slightly. Bake 10-12 minutes, swapping trays halfway, until golden.
Cool and store in an airtight container.

name: Sweet Potato & Black Bean Brownies
steps: Peel, chop, and boil the sweet potatoes until soft, then cool.
Preheat the oven to 360F (180C) and line an 11x7-inch tin with baking paper.
Blend the cooled sweet potatoes, black beans, walnuts, sugar, and chocolate in a food processor until smooth. Add 3 tbsp olive oil and blend again.
Transfer the batter to the tin and bake 50 minutes.
Cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into 12 squares.

name: Apple Bites
ingredients: 2 apples, peeled, cored & cut into chunks
steps: Preheat the oven to 360F (180C) and line an 8-inch tin with parchment.
Mix flour, baking powder, and coconut sugar in a bowl. Add the egg and 1/2 cup melted coconut oil; stir to combine.
Fold in apple chunks.
Pour batter into the tin and bake 35-40 minutes. Cool before removing.

name: Easy Pumpkin Spiced Cake
steps: Preheat the oven to 375F (190C).
Beat eggs and coconut sugar until fluffy and tripled in size, about 5 minutes.
Mix in pumpkin puree and cinnamon.
Fold in sifted self-rising flour gently.
Grease an 8-inch cake pan and pour in batter. Bake 50 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
Cool, slice, and serve.

name: Citrusy Coconut Chia Pudding
ingredients: 14 fl oz (400ml) can light coconut milk
steps: Mix chia seeds, coconut milk, and 2 tbsp maple syrup in a bowl. Cover and chill 6 hours or until thick.
In another bowl, combine clementines, kiwis, and remaining maple syrup. Chill until the pudding is ready.
Serve the pudding in 4 bowls, topped with fruit. Keeps in the fridge up to 5 days.

name: Blueberry Cottage Cheese Ice Cream
steps: Blend cottage cheese, banana, and whey powder in a blender until smooth. Stir in dried blueberries.
Freeze 45 minutes, then stir and freeze another 45 minutes.
Stir again and serve with fresh blueberries.

name: Tropical Spiced Carrot Smoothie
steps: Blend all the ingredients in a blender until smooth. Serve.

name: Athlete's Rice Krispie Squares
steps: In a large saucepan over low heat, combine butter, milk, vanilla extract, and white chocolate chips. Stir continuously until the chocolate chips melt.
Add the marshmallows. Stir until completely melted into a smooth mixture.
Remove from heat and immediately stir in the vanilla whey protein powder until well combined.
Add the Rice Krispies and stir vigorously until evenly coated.
Pour into a lined baking pan. Spread evenly and press down gently.
Cool at room temperature. Once set, cut into squares.

name: Hearty Italian Ragu
steps: Remove sausage skins and add the sausage meat and mince to a large heavy-bottomed pan over medium-high heat. Break the meat up, cooking until browned, about 10-15 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same pan, add olive oil and saute the diced onions, fennel, and carrots over medium-high heat 12-15 minutes until softened and caramelized.
Add garlic, fennel seeds, and thyme. Cook 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Pour in the white wine, stirring to lift browned bits. Let the wine evaporate, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the meat to the pan with tomato paste, tinned tomatoes, chicken stock, and milk. Stir and bring to a low simmer.
Cover and cook on low 3-4 hours, stirring occasionally. Top up with stock if it reduces too much.
Cook pasta per package instructions. Mix the sauce into the cooked pasta and sprinkle with Parmesan.

name: Lean Double Smash Burgers
steps: In a small bowl, mix light mayonnaise, ketchup, mustard, paprika, a pinch of salt, and black pepper. Set aside.
Divide the lean beef mince into 4 even portions. Roll each into a loose ball, season, and set aside.

Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Place the beef balls onto the pan. Smash each down until thin and cook 2-3 minutes until crispy. Flip, add a slice of cheddar to each, and cook 1-2 minutes until the cheese melts.
While the burgers cook, slice the white onion and tomato, and wash the lettuce. Toast the brioche buns.
Spread the burger sauce on both sides of the buns. Add lettuce, tomato, and raw onion on the bottom half. Place the cheesy patty on top and finish with the top bun.

name: Lean Layered Lasagna
steps: Finely dice all the vegetables. Heat the oven to 200C/392F fan.

Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Saute the diced vegetables with a pinch of salt 10 minutes. Add the minced beef, breaking it up. Cook on high 10 minutes, adding tomato puree, balsamic vinegar, and rosemary. Pour in the passata, fill the tin with water, and add. Stir in stock, lentils, and seasoning. Simmer 15-20 minutes until thickened.

In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Stir in the flour and cook 3 minutes, stirring. Gradually whisk in the milk, 200ml at a time. Stir in cheddar, stock cube, salt, and pepper. Simmer 5 minutes until thickened.
In a baking dish, spread a layer of ragu, then bechamel and a grating of Parmesan. Add a layer of lasagna sheets. Repeat twice more. Finish with bechamel, black pepper, and the remaining Parmesan.
Cover with foil and bake 20 minutes. Uncover and bake another 15 minutes until golden. Rest 10 minutes before serving.

name: Pecan Banana Muffins
steps: Preheat your oven to 200C (180C fan) or Gas Mark 6.
In a large bowl, combine the self-raising flour and baking powder. In a separate bowl, mash the ripe bananas. Add honey, olive oil, eggs, vanilla, milk, and Greek yogurt. Mix until combined.
Gradually pour the banana mixture into the dry ingredients. Stir gently until just combined.
Fold in the chopped pecans. Distribute the batter between 12 muffin cases.
Bake 18-20 minutes until risen and golden. A toothpick should come out clean.

name: Power Bagels
steps: Set your oven to 180C (350F) to preheat.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and blended cottage cheese. Stir until a dough forms. If too dry, gradually add warm water.
Transfer the dough to a floured surface and knead a few minutes until smooth and elastic.
Roll into a ball and cut into 4 equal parts. Roll each into a ball, then make a hole in the center and pull apart to create a bagel shape.
Place the bagels on a parchment-lined tray. Brush with beaten egg and sprinkle sesame seeds on top.
Bake 25 minutes until golden brown and firm.

name: Ruby Refresher Smoothie
steps: Ensure the beetroot is cooked and the apple and kiwi are washed.
Slice all fruits into smaller pieces for easier blending.
In a blender, combine the beetroot, kiwi, apple, frozen strawberries, and water. Blend until smooth.

name: Sausage Roll Bites
steps: Remove the skins from the sausages, or mash them directly in a bowl with a fork. Stir in the sage, thyme, and chopped rosemary. Season with salt and mix well.
Spread the sausage mixture evenly across a large tortilla wrap, leaving a small gap along one edge to seal with beaten egg. Roll the tortilla up tightly.
Slice the wrap into 8-10 pieces.
Brush each bite with beaten egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Preheat the air fryer to 200C (392F). Arrange the bites spaced apart and cook about 12 minutes until crispy and cooked through.

name: Scrambled Oats
steps: In a blender, combine the oats, banana, egg, and protein powder. Blend until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Pour in the oat mixture, allowing it to set slightly like a pancake. Then scramble, stirring constantly, until fully cooked and resembling scrambled eggs.
While the oats cook, wash the berries, measure the yogurt, and grate the dark chocolate.
Spoon the scrambled oats onto a plate. Top with blueberries, raspberries, yogurt, and grated dark chocolate.

name: Sesame Prawn Toast with Zesty Slaw
steps: Mince the raw prawns roughly to create a chunky texture. Combine with chili flakes, 2 spring onions, sesame oil, ginger, soy sauce, egg whites, and lime zest. Season and mix well.

In a separate bowl, mix the shredded cabbage, cucumber, grated carrot, spring onions, and coriander. Combine sweet chili sauce, fish sauce, and lime juice for the dressing. Pour over the vegetables and massage to coat.
Spread the prawn mixture evenly over each slice of bread, pressing down. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Preheat the air fryer to 200C (392F) and cook the prawn toast 10-12 minutes.
Plate the prawn toast and serve with the zesty slaw on the side.

name: Strawberry Oat Breakfast Smoothie
steps: Place all of the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Tikka Skewers with Spiced Rice
steps: Dice the chicken breasts and marinate with the tikka masala paste. Let sit at least 10 minutes.
Thinly slice the red onion and season with salt and the juice of 1 lemon. Toss and set aside.
Preheat the air fryer to 200C (390F). Cook the marinated chicken 12-15 minutes, turning halfway.
While the chicken cooks, prepare the microwave spiced rice per packet instructions.
Mix the Greek yogurt, chopped mint, and a pinch of salt.
When the chicken is nearly done, add the lemony onions on top and cook another 3 minutes.
Plate the rice, top with chicken and onions, a spoonful of mint yogurt, and quartered tomatoes. Serve immediately.

name: The Power-Up Breakfast Smoothie
steps: Blend all the ingredients in a blender until smooth. Serve.
